Table summary.
Area: Bookkeeping / financial recordkeeping experience. What To Look For: Relevant experience with transactions, records, reconciliation, reports, payroll coordination, or office finance.. Rating: _ / 5.
Area: Accuracy and attention to detail. What To Look For: Careful, methodical, checks work, notices inconsistencies.. Rating: _ / 5.
Area: Confidentiality and integrity. What To Look For: Understands sensitive records, donor confidentiality, payroll privacy, and appropriate access.. Rating: _ / 5.
Area: Software and spreadsheet comfort. What To Look For: Able to use or learn church finance software, spreadsheets, and digital records.. Rating: _ / 5.
Area: Reliability and organization. What To Look For: Can maintain recurring weekly and monthly rhythms and meet deadlines.. Rating: _ / 5.
Area: Communication and judgment. What To Look For: Asks good questions, flags concerns, works respectfully with leaders and committees.. Rating: _ / 5.
Area: Church fit and service posture. What To Look For: Understands this role as service to the church and can work within church policies and culture.. Rating: _ / 5.
